title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS equips AI coding agents with up-to-date AWS documentation, best practices, and tested procedures via skills (Markdown runbooks), plugins, and MCP configuration. It includes guardrails, auditability through CloudTrail, and enables deployment of Lambda functions with API Gateway in minutes.
